authority: Pinned official Astro MDX is authoritative. Qrels, ground truth, retrieval artifacts, rankings, and scores are derived and non-authoritative.
prompt_isolation: The agent receives the question, expected response ID, and source-generic response contract. It does not receive qrels, ground truth, derivation logic, expected evidence, or failure conditions.

contamination.q039: inspected after the prior freeze and used in an ensemble diagnostic
contamination.q040: used in prior one-question paired comparisons and tuning diagnostics
contamination.effect: Both questions are train-only in this prospective evolution harness.
